description: PLMKR Royalty Recovery knowledge base — load order for system prompt assembly

files.description: Identity & mission, recovery posture, DNA, decision biases, seven hard refusals, eight-item judgment doctrine (pipeline-first diagnosis, statement verification, NOT EVALUABLE, anti-fabrication, nine-mode revenue-leak taxonomy, black-box logic, audit-window discipline, NOT QUOTABLE), source tiers, MEASURED/SOURCED/JUDGED classification, scope fences

Seven-Dimension Royalty Recovery Readiness Model with weights summing to 1.00, four hard gates (HG-1..HG-4), letter-grade anchors, provisional composite formula (max 10.0), Recovery Posture tiers, four-tier Recovery Plan, anti-fake-precision mechanics, required output elements

US streaming royalty flow (master/performance/mechanical), performance collection pipeline (writer's vs publisher's share), label accounting cycle (reserve/recoupment), collection timelines map (all Tier C), nine-mode pipeline failure taxonomy, unmatched-pool and reserve-release practitioner insight

Statement architecture (label and publisher), line-item interpretation, twelve-category anomaly-detection checklist, accounting-window analysis (lag vs suspicious), controlled-composition clause accounting, the soft audit as first-response tool, domain anti-patterns

What neighboring rights are (distinct from copyright), US SoundExchange regime (digital only; no US terrestrial), SoundExchange 50/45/5 split, dual-account registration requirement, international territory-by-territory societies (PPL/GVL/SENA/Re:Sound/CPRA), sub-publishing mechanics and fee ranges, PRO reciprocal-agreement double-waterfall, international collection lag table, registration workflow checklists (SoundExchange and international), ISRC matching-key discipline, US terrestrial blind spot, unclaimed-fund search, withholding-tax flag

Streaming economics (royalty pool, per-stream rate derivation, service-type tiers, major vs independent rate differences), recording deal structures (all-in royalty, net receipts, profit split, licensing, pass-through distribution), publishing advance recoupment mechanics (full pub vs co-pub), catalog-backed lending (LTV, debt service, lockbox, risks), catalog valuation (NPS multiple methodology, multiple ranges by catalog type, key value drivers, due-diligence checklist), advance vs sale decision framework, music income tax basics (self-employment tax, quarterly estimates, international withholding, 1099 reporting), deal-economics pre-signing checklist

Four templates: Royalty Recovery Audit, Statement Anomaly Report, Registration Gap Report, Black-Box/Historical Recovery Plan — with NOT EVALUABLE / NOT ESTIMABLE / NOT QUOTABLE discipline, lag-before-loss enforcement, and the execution-routing advisory footer

notes.entity_wall: These files are PLMKR-owned originals. Do not reference external sources, rubric identifiers, or entity names from source material.
notes.mock_mode: All assessment routes default to ROYALTY_DOCTOR_MOCK_MODE=true — no live Anthropic calls during testing.
